Devin, we are sorry you felt that Brandi's energy ruined your day. If you're looking for legal representation that combines expertise with genuine care for clients, I highly recommend Bruce Smith of Smith & Shipley . They truly go above and beyond.

***PLEASE READ BEFORE YOU HIRE JOLEI SHIPLEY***

Read her reviews. This isn't a one off complaint from a disgruntled client. It is a consistent pattern of behavior.

I hired Jolei for my divorce and she is one of the worst lawyers(and people) I have ever had the displeasure of dealing with. Her only goal is taking your money and closing your case while doing as little work as possible. She didn't advocate for me in any way, shape or form. She constantly pushed me to accept the lopsided terms my ex and her lawyer were offering while trying to scare me by saying the judge would likely give me even less if it ended up going to trial. I am not exaggerating when i say it felt like it was me versus Jolei and my ex during mediation.

I am fortunate that I can afford to hire a different attorney and the difference was absolutely night and day. My new attorney said there was absolutely no reason for me to accept anything close to what my ex was offering and he could see no reason the judge would say anything differently. If I had listened to Jolei during mediation I would have lost hundreds of thousands of dollars. My new attorney was going to do depositions, sent questions to opposing counsel to be answered and was taking many other steps to put us into an advantageous position. Jolei did absolutely NOTHING before pushing me into mediation and then trying to manipulate me to take my ex's offers. In all honesty my ex wife should have paid Jolei the $10k because Jolei advocated for her much more than me. After hiring my new attorney my ex and I quickly reached an agreement in which I literally got 100% of what I was asking for.

The reviews about her lack of communication are also true. During mediation she said she was going to forward me an email sent from opposing counsel. I have emailed and called her office for over a month trying to get her to do what she told me she would do. She FINALLY responded and said she had no idea what i was talking about and that no such email even existed, lol. I replied to that email and its been 9 days with no response. I guess $10k doesn't get you what it used to.....

To top everything off, she is also VERY racist. We were talking about the local Harmony Science Academy school and Jolei said "Oh, you don't want your kid to go there they teach Jihad". When I told her how offensive that was she doubled down and literally couldn't understand how I thought she said anything wrong. I have filed a complaint with the State Bar, but I have low hopes that they will do anything.

To summarize, if you want to burn $10k on a racist, lazy lawyer who will probably do more to help your opposition than you then Jolei Shipley is exactly who you are looking for. If you want a lawyer that will earn their money and be an advocate for you then please look elsewhere.

Please trust the reviews that others and I have posted and find someone that will do what is right for you.

Mr Oxford helped me with my Social Security disability.  My case was actually unique being that I filed on my own in 2021 and was approved. After about 16 months Social Security changed my decision and wanted everything back and said I was supposed to have a hearing in front of an Administrative Law Judge.  I was devastated. I had a lot of depression and many tears on top of surgery after surgery to try and stop my pain within just 18 months.
I called several attorneys seeking help for my situation and asking for them to stand with me in front of the Administrative Law Judge only to be told “Sorry, we can’t help you.”
Then I found Mr Tom Oxford.  From the initial first phone call, to our first appointment… he listened to my situation compassionately and treated me respectfully and not like I was wasting his time.  He was very forthcoming of what could happen and never promised an outcome.
It was a long process but he helped me win back my Social Security Disability.
My husband and I will forever be grateful to Mr Tom Oxford for his professionalism and his knowledge of the Social Security Disability System.
You and your staff are absolutely amazing.
Sincerely,
Nancie Cooper

reviews.ownerResponse:
I don't know who you are and have never met with you regarding ANY legal matter, but can assure you I am not interested in doing so either, especially provided this. I don't know your circumstances, so I don't know how the law would apply to your circumstances. I practice law. That means if I consult with someone, I advise them of the law, how the facts as presented to me apply to the law, what their potential options are, and what representation would cost. If you are complaining about what the law is, write your legislator. If *YOU* need legal advice, I suggest *YOU* go see a lawyer.

So, just to be clear, someone I've never seen or spoken to is leaving a 1 star google review for services that do not pertain to you regarding someone who received a consultation from me during which a determination was made I would not be able to assist with that individuals legal matter? I just want it to be very clear - you don't know what that person said during their consult, what all was discussed during that consult, and what I said to that person during that person's consult, but based on someone else's representation I couldn't help them left this review?

Why didn't you take the person who came to the consult to your "expensive lawyers?"

reviews.text: Very courteous, efficient, effective and professional. My issue was simple, but got Marcus got it handled quickly.
Called to speak with an attorney about a real estate case . The secretary told me they don’t do real estate but everything I've read on their website and google account says they do .
reviews.ownerResponse:
Mr. Lauderdale, did my firm previously represent you in a 2016 matter?
In any event, I am truly apologetic for any miscommunication and/or misunderstandings. I do handle a variety of real-estate matters, including contracts related to mineral and other rights. If your matter is a landlord/tenant matter (in a Justice od the Peace court) I have found it rarely in a potential client's economic benefit to secure counsel, although, once again, it really depends on the circumstances, as there may be issues of title involved that might require resolution by a higher court.
There are also times when real estate matters are actually probate matters, or may intersect with probate matters.

If you would still like a consultation, please reach out to my office in order to get on the calendar. I will make sure the typical $25 scheduling fee - instituted to cut down on people who scheduled a free consultation then failed to show.

If your matter is not complex, you may be able to secure instructions and forms for certain types of matters at Texaslawhelp.org . Instructions and forms found through that resource is not a substitution for advice of counsel, and I am not suggesting it as a substitute for legal advice.

Whatever miscommunication may have taken place, I would like to attempt to remedy for you.

This is not meant to suggest the provision of legal representation, but only a consultation during which we discuss your specific legal issue(s) including providing you what options your situation may warrant, as well as a discussion of the methods and potential costs associated with your specific matter.

My receptionist & scheduling coordinator is relatively new and still learning the various types of cases we might take. The answer to that question often depends heavily on the facts.

If your matter has been resolved and/or you are no longer need an attorney, we wish you the best!

P.S. Whatever staff member you spoke with I am absolutely certain was not trying to ne rude or dismissive if you felt that way, but rather to save you the booking fee and the time you might spend waiting on and/or attending a consultation only to be told "we don't take those types of cases."

There are times, for instance, where someone might believe slipping in a grocery store is "real estate," but in reality is a premises liability case that would be handled by a personal injury attorney.

I was searching for an attorney while never even been to the city of Beaumont. While going through the consultation, I had brought up the google reviews & said that bad communication was one thing that got brought up & I was concerned about. He put every fear I had to rest & then some! He communicated with me on every update, jumped right on the case within the next few hours (LITERALLY!!), every bump in the road that I came across, his office put my mind at ease, & every question was answered with straight-no-BS-or-sugarcoating kind of way! My great-niece was at jeopardy, & CPS was fighting tooth & nail to keep her in Beaumont, even though there was no family there. Mr. Wilkerson aggressively took apart their “investigation”, he was able to submit evidence that cleared the way for my family to regain custody of the baby, & we couldn’t have asked for a better attorney to shoot straight & get the job done! We wish he could have followed the rest of the case once it’s transferred, because I’m afraid we won’t find another like him! We had people in the courtroom asking for his name because of how well he presented the case. I highly recommend Mr. Wilkerson, I can’t thank him enough for what he’s done for my family.

reviews.ownerResponse: Who is your husband? For the record, I don't have a Mr. Harper on a criminal case, but I would be more than happy to discuss your allegations and negative experience you claim to have had if I knew who you were or who your husband is. Anyone can search records to see parties an attorney represents. Moreover, "why am I going to jail" is not something someone asks at the courthouse. To enter a plea on a case, someone has to execute paperwork and the allegations reviewed before ever even going before the judge. The DA having info mixed up with someone else's charges doesn't make sense, in part for that very reason. It also doesn't make sense why your husband wouldn't have set an appointment, at the very least, to have reviewed his discovery, as each client is contacted when we have the discovery on their case - standard practice in my office, as is advising a client to schedule an appointment a week prior to any court appearance (to make sure if it is a hearing or trial wr have all of our witnesses lined up).

Tom Kelly represented me in a criminal case that could have seriously impacted my life. Thanks to his hard work, knowledge, and dedication, my case was completely dismissed. He was professional, strategic, and always kept my family and me informed. He fought for me every step of the way, and I can’t thank him enough. If you’re facing criminal charges, I highly recommend Tom Kelly.

No words can express!
Ryan Gertz  is nothing short of incredible. From the very first conversation, he was confident, strategic, and completely invested in my case. What started as an overwhelming federal situation that felt impossible to overcome turned into an outcome I honestly didn’t think could happen.
Ryan was meticulous with the details, relentless in negotiations, and always made sure I understood what was going on without sugarcoating anything. He treated me with respect, answered every question, and fought for me every step of the way. The result he achieved was beyond anything I expected—he took a case that could have completely changed my life and secured a resolution that let me move forward instead of being buried by the system.
If you’re facing serious federal charges and want an attorney who truly knows how to navigate the system and protect your future, Ryan Kurts is the one you want in your corner. I will forever be grateful for what he did for me, and I can’t recommend him highly enough.

When our family was facing one of the most difficult moments of our lives, this law firm, particularly Attorney Tom Kelly and his right-hand, Erin, stood by us with compassion and strength. They treated our son as a person, not just a case number, and fought hard on his behalf. Their guidance brought us peace of mind during an overwhelming situation. We are deeply thankful for their hard work, integrity, and support, and we highly recommend their services. If I could give more stars, I would.
10/10 group of people, would recommend them to absolutely everyone! From the first phone call to the resolution is a smooth, reassuring experience.
A very good lawyer and staff.
Definitely recommend these guys. Especially Mr.Kelley. Had an issue that could’ve messed up my life badly and they were able to get it dropped for me. Thank you guys

This wonderful law firm truly cared about me and my family. Mr. Gertz was a true professional and always took time to reassure me that everything was going to be okay. I would highly recommend Mr. Hertz and his firm if you should ever need help.
Terri Hampton
Jonathon T. Brown
Awesome Staff and Tom Kelley is the best! I would hire again in a heartbeat! Knows his stuff!

We had an amazing experience with Gertz Kelley Law Firm. Ben Jeffries and Erin went above and beyond to help us with our case, achieving an outcome we never could have imagined without their dedication. Despite the very limited time we had, they made everything happen seamlessly. They were always available to answer our questions, guided us through every step, and made us feel at ease throughout the entire process. We are truly grateful for their support and hard work. Thank you, Ben and Erin!

I’m so thankful for Ben Jeffries and his paralegal, Erin Rogers. Erin really took the time to walk me through the whole process of getting my warrants handled. She showed me that she truly cared about me and what happened in my case, which meant a lot during such a stressful time. Ben was also great — he was honest, supportive, and made sure I saved both time and money while everything was being worked out. They made me feel like I wasn’t just another case, and I can’t recommend them enough.
Tom Kelley and his staff are caring, compassionate and go above and beyond for their clients! If he says that he is going to do something, he does it! He's the best attorney in the area!
Tom is a magician on my son’s case. He got it dismissed. Best hard working attorney I know. Highly recommend him. Thanks Tom

Attorney Thomas Kelley is an absolute lifesaver, and I cannot recommend him highly enough! In 2019, I was arrested for a second-degree felony possession of a controlled substance after being caught with two pot brownies while heading back to Florida for college. A couple of months ago, I was extradited from Florida to Texas to face the charge, and I was incredibly anxious about the situation. Thankfully, Attorney Kelley and his phenomenal paralegal, Erin, made the entire process smooth and stress-free. From the moment I arrived in Texas, Attorney Kelli’s overwhelming presence was evident. He had already been in contact with the jail, ensuring a bond was set and ready for me. When I got to the facility, the captain was waiting, and I was bonded out while still in the holding cell—what a relief! His paralegal, Erin, was equally incredible, working tirelessly to keep my family reassured that everything was under control. She went above and beyond, maintaining constant communication with both my family and the jail to ensure every detail was handled. Thanks to Attorney Kelley's expertise and Erin’s dedicated support, my charges were dismissed in less than two months. Their professionalism, compassion, and relentless commitment to my case were unmatched. If you need a legal team that will fight for you and keep you informed every step of the way, Thomas Kelli and Erin are the ones to trust

This firm offered assurance in my life at a troubling point through offering knowledge and supportive information. I spoke with Randi and she referred to Mr T Kelly he gave great understanding of being falsely accused of something. Along with the need to be represented by professional motivated people. I would recommend this firm to anyone that is need of professional and courtesy communitaor.
Lisa White

Highly recommended is Ryan Gertz. Ryan was hired to assist with a felony case involving a family member. Throughout the process, Ryan was incredibly knowledgeable and professional. Ryan clearly explained everything, patiently answered all questions, and provided updates throughout the lengthy process. He expertly handled the case's complexities and was dedicated to achieving the best possible outcome. Ultimately, Ryan helped achieve a favorable outcome. For a serious case, my family and I will consider Ryan in the future.

From the first moment I spoke with Ryan about our situation, I felt significant relief as he assured me that he would handle everything. Ryan and his staff handled our case with compassion and unmatched expertise. His paralegal, Randi, was fantastic with keeping us updated and answering any questions we had in a timely manner. Ryan does exactly what he says he will do "defending people" and we could not be more appreciative.

Tom is a wonderful attorney, he's the man you want standing beside you if you're ever in trouble. He truly cares about his clients and he also has a great support system in his paralegal Erin. Erin has been one of the brightest parts of the last few months of our lives. When i was a terrified mess and didn't know what to do, she was the voice of reason. She ALWAYS knows the details of our life, i never have to remind her of the current situation. She is professional yet personable enough to never doubt she truly cares. Tom and his coworkers are a team, and they are well worth the money.

Mr Tom Kelley and his paralegal Miss Erin, are the most caring and compassionate kind people that I have ever dealt with there is no doubt God put Mr Kelley and his paralegal in my path for a reason. There is no other legal representation that will do right by you and have your best interest at heart like Mr Tom there is no amount of money in this world they could make up for the heart Mr Tom has for his clients. Speaking from experience you will not find a better attorney than Mr Tom Kelley.

I’m very impressed with Benjamin Jefferies and his team especially Erin Rogers . They go out of their way to make sure your family member is taken care of and heard . I would highly recommend this lawyer to anyone to at needs an attorney that cares .

Ryan Gertz provided outstanding criminal defense representation for my loved one. We had heard he was one of the top criminal defense attorneys in Southeast Texas, and after working with him, we completely understand why.

My loved one was facing multiple serious felony charges with a jaw-dropping sentencing range for a nonviolent crime. We were hoping for a fair plea deal from the DA but not expecting much in the way of mercy. On top of that, my loved one has a medical condition that would make even a shorter prison sentence potentially fatal.

It took about three months from arraignment for Ryan to negotiate an incredible deal—one that can allow my loved one to move forward and rebuild their life (potentially without a conviction) and with only a brief prison cognitive program and then deferred adjudicated probation. Ryan negotiated for all but one of the charges to be dropped entirely. Throughout the process, Ryan and his team were responsive, compassionate, and professional. Both he and Randi went above and beyond to ensure the jail was aware of and handling my loved one’s medical needs multiple times, even after the plea deal was done. I am beyond grateful for this, especially, because they probably saved my loved one's life through their efforts.

We are deeply grateful for the outcomes Ryan achieved and highly recommend him to anyone in need of criminal defense. The peace of mind we had knowing he was on the case made a difference. He and his team are some of the heroes helping my loved one have a chance to rebuild and recover their life.

Ryan Gertz is the best attorney that I've ever seen or heard in the courtroom by far. If you value your freedom, Ryan Gertz is the attorney for you. I can't thank him enough for the Not Guilty verdict today for evading arrest with a motor vehicle. Thank you so very much Mr. Ryan Gertz. I'm free today all because of you!

Mr Kelley represented me in a case and due to his hard work and diligence helped lead me to have my case dismissed and expunged.  He was able to talk to me and help me understand what was going on through the entire process.  I appreciate all the work done by Mr Kelley
If you want a lawyer that treats you like a person and wins hire Kelly!

Raegan Minaldi was referred to me through a friend. Her ambitious attitude proved she was fit for the job and confirmed I hired the right person to help me with a very difficult case. Her initiative and positive attitude gave us comfort knowing we had hired the right attorney. I am thankful to have used her and I will recommend her time and time again! #MessageMinaldi

My son had serious charges against him related to drug offenses.  This included revocation of state probation along with additional federal charges.  Ryan Gertz was highly recommended as a lawyer that would fight for my son.  From our first meeting with Ryan, it was apparent that he was a highly skilled and experienced defense attorney who would make sure our son had the best outcome.  With his legal expertise and commitment to acquiring the best results, he guided us all through this stressful journey.  He clearly explained the charges, how this whole legal process would unfold, and how he intended to make sure my son had the best representation in court.  There were complicated circumstances related to the charges and he thoroughly investigated all the evidence to build his case.

Ryan always made himself available to keep us updated or to share information.  He is very easy to talk to, always giving straightforward answers or explanations to any questions we had over the months.  He really cares about his clients.

With Ryan’s guidance, my son rejected a plea deal of 10 years and took his case to trial.  Using facts gathered in his own investigation combined with his skills of presenting a compelling argument, Ryan was able to disprove the prosecutions charges and impact the jury’s decision.  My son was found not guilty on the more serious charges and will not be spending the next 10 or more years away from his family.  Instead, he will be able to regain his life in a short amount of time now, thanks to Ryan fighting on his behalf.

Ryan’s legal team included Associate Attorney, Benjamin Jefferies, who was a great advocate for my son and worked alongside Ryan for the duration of the case.  The office staff is very professional and helpful, Kayla and Angie were always quick to relay information, answer questions, or schedule a meeting.

Ryan is a brilliant attorney!  If you need someone to fight for you or a loved one, I HIGHLY recommend Ryan Gertz with the Gertz Kelly Law Firm.

Our title company told us about this law firm when we needed to have the deed re-written so we called and spoke with Vicky. We mentioned that the title company said it would be $80 and Vicky told us it would take about one week. After calling several times during the next few weeks (and having Vicky fail to return my calls), we finally went to pick it up 3 weeks later. However, Vicky only then told us that it would be $100 and that they required cash or check. Getting to our bank off of Calder was impossible before the law firm closed and so we had to wait until the next week! We then asked her about filing it and she told us we needed to take it to the court house. Two hours after going to the court house and realizing we needed more cash and going through the same ordeal of going to our bank, we called Vicky and realized that she neglected to tell us that she could have filed it for us for the same price the court house charged... You should go somewhere else!

Eric Franklin took on my case when several other attorneys didn’t think it was worth their time. From the beginning, he treated me with respect and gave my situation the attention it deserved. He spent a significant amount of time working through the details and never made me feel like just another file on a desk.

What really stood out was his work ethic and communication. Eric personally called me many times to discuss the case, keep me updated, and answer questions. That level of direct communication is rare and meant a lot to me. You could tell he genuinely cared about doing the job right.

In the end, Eric was able to secure a settlement for me when others believed nothing would come of it. His persistence, professionalism, and willingness to fight for his client made all the difference. I’m extremely grateful for his hard work and would absolutely recommend Eric Franklin to anyone looking for an attorney who will truly put in the effort for their client.

I had the pleasure of meeting Mr. Allison recently for a last minute personal/family legal matter which needed a quick turnaround. I found him to be very personable, frankly honest, and quite thorough. He took his time with me, didn't seem rushed or annoyed, and answered all my questions without making me feel stupid. He was professional with a good sense of humor, which is important to me. Who wants a stuffy lawyer with no personality? The process was very simple. He gave me a checklist of what he needed. I provided the information and he created a draft. He was very responsive to my questions about the draft. Once I felt comfortable with the draft, Mr. Allison finalized it in a timely manner, knowing I needed it quickly. His paralegal/legal assistant, Tracie was super flexible with getting me in for a notarized signature. She was very knowledgeable in the matter and has quite the sense of humor as well. Overall, I would highly recommend Mr. Allison for family legal matters.

I rarely write reviews, but some people make such an extraordinary impact on your life that staying silent would be wrong. Judge Layne Walker Senior is one of those people.

I am a highly successful Cardiologist who spent my entire life studying, sacrificing, and working relentlessly to build my career and reputation. During a highly contentious divorce, I was targeted by a flood of completely false allegations and malicious criminal charges intended to destroy me personally and professionally. Some of these charges carried the potential of life imprisonment. My freedom, my career, and everything I had built over decades were suddenly at risk.

From the moment Judge Walker took my case, he did far more than provide legal representation. He quite literally saved my life, my career, and my future. Through his exceptional legal knowledge, strategic brilliance, and unwavering determination, he succeeded in having all criminal charges completely dismissed. What seemed impossible became reality because of him.

What truly sets Judge Walker apart is who he is as a human being. He walked with me step by step through one of the darkest periods of my life. He was not only my lawyer, but my advocate, my protector, my confidant, and at times my mentor. When emotions ran high and pressure was overwhelming, he made sure I did not rush the process and always kept my focus on achieving the best possible outcome. His calm guidance, honesty, and wisdom gave me strength when I had very little left.

Judge Walker stood by me with integrity, compassion, and courage. He believed in me when the situation was designed to break me. Because of him, I was able to reclaim my life, my reputation, and my peace of mind.

Beyond the courtroom, Judge Layne Walker has become a lifelong friend; something that speaks volumes about his character. If you are facing serious legal challenges and need someone who will fight for you with unmatched dedication, intelligence, and heart, I cannot recommend Judge Layne Walker Senior highly enough. He is truly one of a kind.

I briefly explained main points to him about the situation and started the questions in less than 3 to 4 minutes. His responce was not a single answer but cutting me off still with a angry tone asking me if i had spoken to any other attorneys. To wich i replied only 1 and that i am in the begining stages of deciding and really researching what chapter bankruptcy would work best for my family or if its even the proper thing to do yet in my situation. He could tell i have done some research as anyone would. His responce was to cut me off mid sentance and tell me to "shutup" and listen to him he is the attorney not google and then said better yet call another attorney we dont want your case and hung up in my face. I was dumbfounded and flabergasted how a attorney could be so inprofessional on a initial conseltation. I will not be treated like some lowlife by a single person much less a person i was considering hiring to represent my family through such a complicated personal process that if hired is supposed to be representing me. He did not at all explain any of the process or answer a single question before he had his emotional meltdown. Must of been a bad day or something, because i did nothing but explain and start asking my questions as he asked me to. Bad day or not its not at all how you treat a single person in the world. Much less a potential client. Obviously has a ego about himself that he is the big man lawyer and can tell potential customers to shutup and listen. Based on there website he is the younger son working under his dad for a well established business. Hope his dad sees this. And corrects his sons attitude. But for me i will take my funds elsewhere to hire a attorney who cares through this process and that type behaviour is not tolerated. If i had said something rude or even been in a verbal confrentation it could of been understood for the attitude. But that was not the case at all. Literly responding to his request for info and questions, and cut off and told to shut up and listen. Hope others have a better experience with this firm. But this was my experience.

reviews.text:
This review spans 12/2/22 to 10/2024.  I contacted Marc Whitehead & Associates needing help on dealing with a denial of disability from the SSA.  Dee in the in-take office was my first contact and she also was the reason I decided to go with the firm.  I contacted 3 Attorneys on this issue and Dee was the only voice I heard that seemed confident about my case.  Dee was the only person I spoke to that between the other Attorney offices that made me feel like the attorneys actually wanted to take my case and she made it seem like an everyday thing.

After signed up with Mark Whitehead and Associates I had help from several case workers throughout the process that kept me updated on processing and paperwork.  I kept going to my doctors hoping to get better and it never happened.  Luckily I had a great legal team backing me up and after an ALJ hearing with great exhibits, dialog, and attorney Britney McDonald Esq. everything was approved.  The approval also kept my original request date which is helping me get on Medicare.

If you are disabled and struggling stop trying to do everything yourself and get some legal help with Mark Whitehead and Associates.  They helped me develop a case even though I have chronic pain, difficulty concentrating, and seem to always be tired with my meds.  It really helped me out in the long run when I made up my mind to get legal help and it could help you too.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for taking the time to leave us this wonderful review Larry! We greatly appreciate it!

Called and made an appointment for a consultation. Had an emergency did the right thing and canceled. A family member offered to cover the emergency so I rescheduled. Got to the appointment and the front receptionist to the right got my info then gave me direction. She was quite polite. The receptionist informed Cindy I was present.

I sat on the sofa filled out the paperwork as requested and then listened to Cindy.  Cindy  received a personal call from her cell (rang very loudly). She and the man discussed picking up his Tylenol 3s. She asked if he reported he had problems before.  She questioned him a few times and he responded it was just Tylenol 3. Cindy spoke that loud completely oblivious to who was in the office.

After about 20 minutes Mr Roebuck asked about his appointment - Me. Cindy proceeded to tell him I was “goofy” that I made an appointment then canceled then made it again.  Now Cindy was quite aware of my  emergency because 1) I was honest about what occurred and 2) she shared she is also a caregiver to her mother. She even told me over the phone that she was old.  Cindy informed Mr. Roebuck that I refused to give my name only saying K. (Seeing how Cindy talks I’m glad I didn’t).

I know it could not have been the color of my skin because she had not met me yet. However, I will say some people are not designed to be good customer service rep. I don’t know if this firm is good or bad, but I do know that I left because the customer service representing the firm indicated that I would not be safe there to do my business. If I can sit and listen to Cindy ask about reporting prior drug issues when receiving Tylenol 3s or calling potential unkind names what other business is she spouting- completely oblivious to who is listening.
BEWARE.
The receptionist had enough decency to realize Cindy was the issue - looked at me as I walked out and quietly apologized.
Excellent mediator I use in land cases.  24 year old fight I was fifth lawyer on a very contentious case.  Settled!!! Unbelievable.
Very helpful and knowledgeable, lawyers and staff. I appreciate that they took the time to talk to me.
We’re very professional and courteous. Great law firm!

I respect honesty. This firm will tell you honestly what they can or cannot do for you. They do not try to sugarcoat it. If they can help you, they will give 100% to you. If they cannot help, they will point you in the direction of someone who can. I definitely recommend this firm!

If you are looking for a good attorney this is NOT the place. He is unprofessional, disrespectful, and not reliable. You can clearly see from other reviews that he does not commutate well. Find yourself another law firm.

Jeff Roebuck is the best attorney I have ever dealt with.  I've used him for my business,  personal, and probate matters. He doesn't mess around.  He just gets the job done. He is very professional,  as is the rest of the office staff. This lawfirm has never let me down and I will continue to use them. All other attorneys I have used have juiced me for hourly rates with little results.  As a business owner, I'm all about paying someone what they are worth. Mr. Roebuck not only charges a fair rate, but you see expedient positive results. In my opinion, the best attorney in Texas. I've used many. Houston,  Beaumont,  Dallas. He actually cares about his clients and is passionate about what he does. You will not be disappointed.
In my experience dealing with Mr. Roebuck and his staff, they have proven to be reliable, responsive and go the extra mile. I very much recommend.
Mr. Roebuck helped my son with some intense legal issues.  He did an excellent job.  Would highly recommend him and his company.

I have worked with Mr. Roebuck and staff for the past five years on some hard cases. He delivers what he promises and sometimes protects you from yourself. I would recommend him to anyone looking for legal services, criminal or civil.
Jeff Roebuck was fairly easy to deal with. His assistant, Sarah was extremely pleasant and helpful.
Good food and service despite how busy they are any time of day

Very helpful and friendly. As a small business owner Jeff Roebuck has been my go to guy for any legal advise I need. He set up my LLC for me and typed up all the legal documents I needed in record time. I was recommended to him and I can't thank the person that recommended him enough. His staff is also super nice and friendly. I have heard a lot negative lawyer jokes in my days. But this guy is no joke. Always a pleasure to do business with him.

Jeff Roebuck is a stellar attorney. He is a master of his craft. I used him in 2013 and 2014 in a family law matter to get primary custody of my two children. The case had multiple twists and turns, and ended up being decided by a jury, rather than how it began, in front of a judge. Jeff was brilliant in front of the jury. Anyone who knows about child custody cases will tell you, jury cases are very tough for the father to win. Well, win we did, and BIG. I thank God regularly, for putting me in the hands of Jeff Roebuck. If you have a legal problem, and you think no one cares or can help, call the A-Team, Jeff Roebuck.

Went to see Jeff about a will a months ago and he told me to send him an email with specifics of my request and 4 emails and 2 phone calls later, I still have not received a response or confirmation that he received my email.  I think he’s blowing me off.

It's A Great Thing That We Have Others That Want To Be A Go To Guide And Help With Whatever The Case Maybe Involving Accidents,With Knowledge To Lead You In A More Strengthen Position Other Than Being Stuck With No Guide of Directions,

I just wanted to comment on attorney Fabiana Baum and her assistants for their excellent collaboration when they handled my case. They were wonderful people, and we had a very positive outcome. I highly recommend their services.

This place don't contact you you have to call them ,want update you on anything, and they make up excuses for their staff i have left several messages  no response, i will never recommend them to know one

Fabiana handled my case and I was very pleased with her work. She was extremely attentive throughout the whole process, always willing to explain everything clearly and make sure everything was resolved in the best way possible. I’m very satisfied with her service and highly recommend her!

I can’t thank Fabiana Baum and her team enough for all their help with my accident case. From the very beginning, they showed genuine care and compassion, and making sure I understood what was happening. Fabiana, Deborah, Monica, and their entire team are always helpful, very kind, and always attentive to what one needs. Very grateful for all the help. You are the best.

I highly recommend this team. After a serious work accident, Fabiana, Deborah A., and Monica supported me throughout the entire process. They worked behind the scenes so I could focus on my recovery and my family, without the stress of dealing with other attorneys or depositions. They were always professional, kept me updated at every step, and answered all my questions. Fabiana even visited my home after hours to discuss my settlement, and with James's help, they explained my options clearly.

I never imagined I would need an attorney, but I am so grateful I found this team. My family and I will always appreciate everything they did for us.

I’m sharing my personal experience with this firm, and it was disappointing. My straightforward hit-and-run case took 28 months to resolve, well beyond the 6–18 months I was initially told. Communication was poor, and I felt largely left in the dark throughout the process.

I was passed between FOUR different legal assistants, which created confusion and inconsistency. While this firm may have had a strong reputation in the past, that wasn’t reflected in my experience. I wouldn’t use them again or recommend their services.

Personal Injury Case Settlement

After my accident, I attempted to handle things myself and quickly learned that obtaining legal representation is paramount.  Doctors and medical facilities are not helpful when one does not have medical insurance (which I did not at the time.)

After speaking with friends and attorneys and then finally Darren Brown, I decided that Provost Umphrey had the knowledge, resources and personnel to help me with my case. Fabiana Baum was my legal counsel and her legal assistant is Deborah Aquirre.  Fabiana is a personal injury attorney and immigration lawyer that speaks English, Portuguese, Italian and Spanish. She is amazing.

With Fabiana's guidance and the help and communication from Deborah, updates and assistance, working with hospitals, doctors and medical facilities instantly became effortless, to my relief.

I was advised to keep a weekly diary of my issues resulting from the accident which was very helpful when the depositions and requests for information began. There was a lot of that because the case lasted three (3) years.

James E. Payne, Senior Firm Partner entered the boardroom and on the day of my first mediation. James is fantastic and explained that he was not going to let the insurance company take advantage of me and my situation.

There were two zoom mediations, and both took the entire day from 9am to 4pm...  These mediations were a few months apart.  When the final hour approached, at the end of the day at our second mediation, only a month before our second scheduled trial, James and Fabiana returned with an offer to settle that was so far past my initial expectations that I was in shock for a month.

I was initially told by my brother who is an attorney, to do your research, to choose wisely and to trust your counsel.  I'm very grateful for that advice.

It only comes with experience and resources that a team of attorneys would not rush to settle.  The Provost Umphrey Law Firm did not rush to settle... It was difficult to wait and I often felt overwhelmed, but in the end, with the help, guidance and communication from Fabiana and Deborah, that chapter of my life is finished and a new chapter begins.

I can't thank James, Fabiana, Deborah and the entire Provost Umphrey Team enough for helping me navigate the medical and legal system.

Provost Umphrey Law Firm is Highly Recommended.

This is an amazing law firm, they over exceeded my expectations, big shoutout to Fabiana Baum and Ms. Debrah. They treated me well and managed to help me resolve my car accident case fast and showed support as well. I highly recommended this law firm, and you will not be disappointed.

As soon as my husband found out he had Mesothelioma, he called Provost Umphrey Law Firm in Beaumont Tx. They sent us a packet to fill out to our home and return. When we got home 5 weeks later, it was all overwhelming. My best friend worked at Mr Umphrey’s nursery on his property at that time. I called her to let her know we were home. She told me to hold on that Mr. Umphrey was in her office there at the nursery and she handed him the phone. He asked me how we were doing and asked how he could help. I explained how overwhelmed we were with the process of filling out the paperwork. He said he would send out a lawyer from the firm the next morning and help us with the filing of the lawsuit against the asbestos companies of the products he had come in contact on his job as a Chief Engineer on merchant ships. And he did!!! He sent Colin Moore to our front door the next day. Colin took a deposition from my husband with a camera man and his stenographer.Colin and his team from the firm has kept in close contact with me through the entire journey. My husband unfortunately only lived for 6 months after being diagnosis in 2007 and fought a hard battle. For the last 16 years they have worked hard in securing my future. I have benefited VERY much since that first meeting with Colin. My life is different without my husband. The Provost Umphrey Law firm has brought honor and justice for him and still are working hard. I can’t thank them all enough. They are the best. I highly recommend them to work for your needs.
RIP Walter

I am pleased to be able to share my review here for Attorney's that will work hard for you. My husband suffered a brain injury and My Attorney Fabiana Baum with Provost Umphrey law firm is working very hard to help me & my husband. She is a very knowledgeable & very confident Attorney and will fight for you. Fabiana Baum is who you want To represent you to get great results. She’s tough, and she will fight for You. I am happy I made the right decision when it came to finding a law firm and Attorney Fabian’s Baum that is so dedicated to our case. If you need a good Attorney Fabiana Baum is the one you will want on your side. Thank you Fabiana Baum

Provost Umphrey won $15.4 million for me at trial. They changed my life forever. This firm knows how to get justice for their clients and I will recommend them to everyone I know. Thank you to my lawyers Matthew Matheny and Bryan Blevins for fighting for me.

I normally do not post reviews, however in this instance I am putting this out because their service and dedication it is rarely seen these days. Zach and his team ( Mathew and Sandra ) assisted in helping my 100 year old aunt with her legal request. If you have never had the honor of being around someone that is a 100 yo plus individual I can tell you they are very very demanding. This team went out of their way to make my aunts needs seem like a walk in the park. My aunt uses a walker to get around and its difficult for her to get out in public. This team, via Email and phone, made numerous changes to her documents just about everyday for a week. To keep her safe and comfortable in her home to offered to come to her home for the signing process. Even 15 minutes before they were to leave the office they were able to make several more changes to her document before they left for the meeting. Never once did we hear the words  sorry we can't or its too late.
It is for these reasons my aunt and I highly recommend this firm to handle your legal needs.

reviews.text: My experience with Julianna Nicks was incredible. She knows and understands the legal landscape in her area including all of its players. She looked out for my child’s best interest as well as helped create an outcome that could help promote healing in our coparenting dynamic. Keeping unnecessary costs low was a priority to her. She is real, intelligent, honest, and incredibly strategic. There are some TERRIBLE lawyers out there who will just tell you what you want to hear, keep you angry to keep the fight going and drain your pockets for their own benefit. Julianna is not one of them, I’m so glad I trusted her. She is worth her weight in gold.

My son was caught in a technicality that would have been VERY expensive if he had plead to the violation. Mr. Nicks was dogged in his pursuit of the facts, stood up to the municipalities tactics, and got the violation dismissed. He did exceptional work, and I would highly recommend him.

Jason was a literal life saver! He was tentative, mindful and handled the case with professionalism. Even though emotions have a tendency to run high throughout a case of this magnitude, I will forever be grateful to him and his team for their dedication to this case. Anita and Penny were always there with answers and support, and I highly recommend this team should the need for defense arise! Thank you Jason Nicks law office for all you did for my family.
100% recommend. I would have been lost without them.
Doesn’t call and discuss case with client and when he has clear evidence of handwriting he chooses to not properly defend client. Not someone I’d use for criminal cases.

I came to Jason, absolutely broken, ready to leave a toxic marriage. From the moment I sat down to speak with him regarding Divorce, he listened intently and empathized with my situation. I’ve never felt more safe than I did in that moment. He immediately went into action, fighting for me. I just needed someone to stand up and fight for me. And Mr.Nicks did exactly that with valiance. He’s called an “aggressive” attorney for a reason, he does not allow his clients to be bullied. Although it has not been a fun experience, the divorce I mean, I’m thankful I chose Mr.Nicks as my attorney. I truly don’t know where I’d be if it weren’t for Mr.Nicks and Mrs. Anita’s consistent help
Julianna was an excellent communicator through my entire case and handled all of my concerns, very thankful!
Jason is quick to respond and gives utmost professional advice.
Jason was very professional and open during my process. I feel he took my best interest in mind. I would trust Jason to represent me in court, again, without hesitation.

Grateful for this office! Their expertise and dedication helped me get primary custody of my children. The office staff is knowledgeable and supportive, they provided seamless communication and clarity throughout the entire process. I highly recommend their services in family law matters.
Caring, competent and intelligent. You can’t find a better attorney.
Mr. Nicks was quite professional and efficient in handling my situation.  Highly recommend him and his office.  Integrity and great result!
Hiring Jason was the best decision I’ve made in a long time.  He is attentive, caring, and truly takes the time to make sure all of his clients needs are met.  I wouldn’t hire anyone else.
Jason works hard for his clients, knows the law and has an excellent reputation in the legal community.
Jason delivers, he knows how to get things you need done. Saved my wife fines and probation. Good guy.
Terrible service!!! Do not go to this firm!!
Jason is never in the office and always on vacation. He sat on custody paperwork for a month and a half causing my boyfriend to lose his Spring Break with his kids. Terrible service.
Jason was very professional and honest knowing what my case was and with it being out of his realm he still helped with a recommendation. Great service and very helpfully.

Jason Nicks has been a blessing to my family. He’s very professional but still gives off a heir of compassionate behavior towards both his client, and his clients loved ones. He seems to care about his clients and the pursuit of justice a great deal. He is a master at his trade, a professional that is truly respectable, respectful, and that possesses a great deal of integrity and intellect. Highly recommended when it’s you, or in my case, your loved one, that awaits sentencing.

This will be my second time hiring him. He is very professional, easy to talk to about your situation, and upfront (so no surprises.)  His secretary is very lovely as well. I would  completely  recommend  hiring  him.
Most people don't enjoy visiting with an attorney but he was very professional and sensitive to my situation.

Paid him way too much money and he did a poor job, when we had all proof that he had already paid her out of the house...Jason is a joke, he will take your money and give nothing in return....laywers like this should never get a client....wish there was some way we could sue him for our money back...very dissatisfied.

Wasn't a good experience for me, never returned phone calls, paid him way more than I should have, never filed with the court till the last minute so they never knew he was my attorney, wasn't at my court hearing, 4 years after my divorce I'm still having issues with my ex. Do not recommend.
Do not call  will not help .
I will be going here for all of my legal work
The staff was very friendly and helpful. Mr Bradley was really nice,and took down all my information on my case . And said he would do everything to help me out on my case.

My mom passed and I had a lot of business to handle after her death. I had no idea where to start. I was not in the best headspace. Someone recommended Bradley law firm. I made an appointment and they took the time to break it into reasonable understandable steps. I was treated like a person instead of a file number. Steven did a great job and handled everything promptly and professionally. Miss Ginger was a lifesaver she answered all the questions I had no matter how big or small. I couldn't have asked for a better team.

DO NOT, I REPEAT DO NOT HIRE THESE PEOPLE!!!... They are the WORST accident attorneys in the entire state of Texas. I hired these people on an open and shut trucking accident and I even had witnesses not to mention a admission from the other party in the lawsuit. Because of the accident I was left permanently crippled!! Lost my job, car, home everything!! Destroyed my family left me broke & homeless, they didn't help with ONE SINGLE THING, not Dr visits no living assistance didn't interview the witnesses or even answer or return my calls & I called dozens of times. I was in desperate need of physical therapy & they did nothing about that. I could go on but the outcome of it all is I was sent to voicemail for over 4 YEARS!! That's right people I said years! Now I'm homeless, no car unable to work because of the accident, I plan on suing this law firm, my advice is a four year old would probably represent you better..DO NOT I REPEAT DO NOT HIRE THESE PEOPLE!!
Staff and Lawyers are very talented and professional.
